name: Clawback
description: Command helper for Clawback OpenClaw upgrade rehearsals.

checkoutDir.description: Local Clawback checkout path used in printed commands.

defaultTarget.description: Default OpenClaw target version used in printed rehearsal commands.

privateFixture.description: Include --private-fixture by default in printed rehearsal commands.

checkoutDir.label: Checkout Directory
checkoutDir.help: Path where Clawback is cloned. Defaults to ./clawback in generated setup commands.

defaultTarget.label: Default Target Version
defaultTarget.help: OpenClaw version used when no --target is supplied.

privateFixture.label: Private Fixture By Default
privateFixture.help: Include workspace files and plugin runtime deps in generated rehearsal commands.
